metadata.description: Optional. A unique application/solution name used as base for all resource naming.
Optional. A unique text suffix appended to resource names for uniqueness.

Required. Azure region for all services. Regions are restricted to guarantee compatibility with paired regions and replica locations for data redundancy and failover scenarios based on articles [Azure regions list](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/reliability/regions-list) and [Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server - Azure Regions](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/mysql/flexible-server/overview#azure-regions).
Required. Location for AI Foundry and model deployments.
Optional. Tags to apply to all resources.
Optional. GPT model deployment type.
Optional. Name of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the GPT deployment (TPM in thousands).
Optional. The container registry login server/endpoint for the container images (for example, an Azure Container Registry endpoint).
Optional. The image tag for the container images.
Optional. Resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace (empty = create new).
Optional. Resource ID of an existing AI Foundry project (empty = create new).
Optional. Principal type of the deploying user.

variables.resourceTags: [union(variables('existingTags'), parameters('tags'), createObject('TemplateName', 'Content Processing Solution Accelerator', 'CreatedBy', variables('createdBy'), 'DeploymentName', deployment().name, 'Type', 'Non-WAF'))]

metadata.description: Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.

Access tier.

properties.locations: [if(and(parameters('zoneRedundant'), not(empty(parameters('haLocation')))), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', true()), createObject('locationName', parameters('haLocation'), 'failoverPriority', 1, 'isZoneRedundant', true())), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', parameters('zoneRedundant'))))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Cosmos DB account.
Name of the Cosmos DB account.
MongoDB connection string (without credentials — use Key Vault for secrets).
Endpoint of the Cosmos DB account.
Database name.
Required. The name of the existing Cognitive Services account.
Required. The name of the existing AI project.

projectIdentityPrincipalId.value: [if(and(contains(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects', parameters('name'), parameters('projectName')), '2025-12-01', 'full'), 'identity'), contains(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects', parameters('name'), parameters('projectName')), '2025-12-01', 'full').identity, 'principalId')), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects', parameters('name'), parameters('projectName')), '2025-12-01', 'full').identity.principalId, '')]
